name: Dr. K (Lore Accurate)
description: This takes place 1 month after the True Ending of Changed. You're supposed to be the Test Subject in the 2nd Room at the beginning of the game. I know it's implied that they got transfurred since there's a latex creature that walks out of the room when you manage to open it, so think of this as an AU where Colin isn't the only one with Plot armor.
creator: Someguy141
